summary: R2 architecture review accepts M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001. The prior REQUEST_CHANGES blocker is resolved: M4 FactionKnowledge canonical sorting now includes stable tie-breakers for duplicate logical known-objective, route, supply, and defender estimate keys, and a direct probe confirms same-district duplicate supply estimates canonicalize identically when input order is swapped. The R2 regression covers duplicate-key estimates supplied in different orders, and the M4 test fixtures now use parseRouteId instead of 'as never'. The implementation remains inside allowed sim-core/protocol/test/process scope, keeps player and AI actors on the same GameCommandV1 paths, preserves read-only planning queries, and does not add muster, supply consumption, march execution, siege/combat execution, UI, save-format expansion, full diplomacy, rebellion, or manual battle behavior.

tests_run.result: VALID R2 writer REVIEW handoff JSON.
Task list showed M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 in REVIEW.
No READY tasks emitted while M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 remains in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e M4 duplicate-key FactionKnowledge canonicalization probe
tests_run.result: Printed 'canonical equal' for two otherwise identical M4 states whose same-district supplyEstimates were supplied in opposite orders.
No remaining 'as never' branded-ID fabrication in the M4 test or touched sim-core file.
No forbidden real-time, random, DOM, React, Pixi, Electron, localStorage, or Node IO matches in sim-core source.
Focused M4 suite passed: 1 file, 7 tests.
Protocol schema suite passed: 1 file, 8 tests.
Sim-core package suite passed: 15 files, 106 tests.
Node and worker-compatible deterministic hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest passed 26 files / 173 tests; web package tests passed 1 file / 3 tests.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001
tests_run.result: Task JSON parsed; task id, REVIEW status, R3 risk level, sim-core allowed path, and save-format forbidden path verified.

decisions: Accepted deterministic duplicate-key canonicalization as an appropriate scoped fix because duplicate knowledge observations can be valid when every semantic field participates in ordering.
Accepted the complete tie-breaker ordering for known objectives, route estimates, supply estimates, and defender estimates.
Accepted the RouteId fixture cleanup: tests now use parseRouteId instead of branded-ID fabrication.
No new ADR is required because R2 does not change frozen architecture decisions; it repairs deterministic canonicalization within the approved task scope.
risks: M4 CampaignPlan and FactionKnowledge state remains in-memory only until a later approved M4 save/replay task opens persistence scope.
Downstream M4 tasks must not treat this substrate as implemented muster, supply consumption, march execution, siege/combat execution, or AI planning behavior.
requested_action: Integrate M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 after lead_orchestrator verifies final diff scope, handoff chain, task state, and autonomous goal-mode gates.
